# Data Model: mos_target_marvels_dr11_star_parquet


MOS Target Table: marvels_dr11_star


## Contents
- [Basic Information](#basic-information)
- [Changelog](#changelog)
- [Example DATAFRAME List](#example-dataframe-list)

---

## Basic Information
Contains data for a MARVELS star (DR11 release).

### Naming Convention
$MOS_TARGET/[V_TARG]/[FTYPE]/mos_marvels_dr11_star.[FTYPE] with FTYPE='parquet' and V_TARG='2.0.0' for DR20.

### Releases
DR20

### Enviroments
MOS_TARGET

### Approximate Size
550 KB

### File Type
PARQUET

### Generated by Product
sdss5db targeting database.

### Is a VAC
False

### Data Level
2.3.3

### DATAFRAME List for release DR20
- Primary data frame.

---

## Changelog
Describes changes to the datamodel product and/or file structure from one release to another

---
## Example DATAFRAME List

### Columns


#### starname

- Column Name: starname
- Description: The primary name of the star (STARNAME)
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: String


#### twomass_name

- Column Name: twomass_name
- Description: 2MASS Star Catalog Name
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: String


#### plate

- Column Name: plate
- Description: Plate Name
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: String


#### gsc_name

- Column Name: gsc_name
- Description: Guide Star Catalog Name
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: String


#### tyc_name

- Column Name: tyc_name
- Description: Tycho Star Catalog Name
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: String


#### hip_name

- Column Name: hip_name
- Description: Hipparcos Star Catalog Name
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: String


#### ra_final

- Column Name: ra_final
- Description: Star Right Ascension
- Unit: deg
- Data Type: Float64


#### dec_final

- Column Name: dec_final
- Description: Star Declination
- Unit: deg
- Data Type: Float64


#### gsc_b

- Column Name: gsc_b
- Description: GSC B Magnitude
- Unit: mag
- Data Type: Float64


#### gsc_v

- Column Name: gsc_v
- Description: GSC V Magnitude
- Unit: mag
- Data Type: Float64


#### twomass_j

- Column Name: twomass_j
- Description: 2MASS J Magnitude
- Unit: mag
- Data Type: Float32


#### twomass_h

- Column Name: twomass_h
- Description: 2MASS H Magnitude
- Unit: mag
- Data Type: Float32


#### twomass_k

- Column Name: twomass_k
- Description: 2MASS K Magnitude
- Unit: mag
- Data Type: Float32


#### sp1

- Column Name: sp1
- Description: Hipparcos Spectral type 1
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: String


#### sp2

- Column Name: sp2
- Description: Hipparcos Spectral type 2
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: String


#### rpm_log_g

- Column Name: rpm_log_g
- Description: Luminosity Class from SSPP* (Mainseq/Giant/Refstar) Refstar means it is a known planet host (different method used for year34 - see docs)
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: String


#### teff

- Column Name: teff
- Description: SSPP* effective temperature (different method used for year34 - see docs)
- Unit: K
- Data Type: Float32


#### log_g

- Column Name: log_g
- Description: SSPP* Surface gravity (different method used for year34 - see docs)
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float32


#### feh

- Column Name: feh
- Description: SSPP* Metallicity (different method used for year34 - see docs)
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float32


#### gsc_b_e

- Column Name: gsc_b_e
- Description: Error in GSC B Magnitude
- Unit: mag
- Data Type: Float32


#### gsc_v_e

- Column Name: gsc_v_e
- Description: Error in GSC V Magnitude
- Unit: mag
- Data Type: Float32


#### twomass_j_e

- Column Name: twomass_j_e
- Description: Error in 2MASS J Magnitude
- Unit: mag
- Data Type: Float32


#### twomass_h_e

- Column Name: twomass_h_e
- Description: Error in 2MASS H Magnitude
- Unit: mag
- Data Type: Float32


#### twomass_k_e

- Column Name: twomass_k_e
- Description: Error in 2MASS H Magnitude
- Unit: mag
- Data Type: Float32


#### teff_e

- Column Name: teff_e
- Description: Error in SSPP* effective temperature
- Unit: K
- Data Type: Float32


#### log_g_e

- Column Name: log_g_e
- Description: Error in SSPP* Surface gravity (different method used for year34 - see docs) (different method used for year34 - see docs)
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float32


#### feh_e

- Column Name: feh_e
- Description: Error in SSPP* Metallicity (different method used for year34 - see docs)
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float32


#### epoch_0

- Column Name: epoch_0
- Description: Epoch 0
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float32


#### ra_0

- Column Name: ra_0
- Description: Right Ascension at Epoch 0
- Unit: deg
- Data Type: Float64


#### dec_0

- Column Name: dec_0
- Description: Declination at Epoch 0
- Unit: deg
- Data Type: Float64


#### ra_twomass

- Column Name: ra_twomass
- Description: 2MASS Right Ascension
- Unit: deg
- Data Type: Float64


#### dec_twomass

- Column Name: dec_twomass
- Description: 2MASS Declination
- Unit: deg
- Data Type: Float64


#### gsc_pm_ra

- Column Name: gsc_pm_ra
- Description: GSC Proper Motion in RA pmra * cos(dec)
- Unit: mas/yr
- Data Type: Float64


#### gsc_pm_dec

- Column Name: gsc_pm_dec
- Description: GSC Proper MOtion in DEC
- Unit: mas/yr
- Data Type: Float64


#### gsc_pm_ra_e

- Column Name: gsc_pm_ra_e
- Description: Error in GSC Proper Motion in RA pmra * cos(dec)
- Unit: mas/yr
- Data Type: Float64


#### gsc_pm_dec_e

- Column Name: gsc_pm_dec_e
- Description: Error in GSC Proper MOtion in DEC
- Unit: mas/yr
- Data Type: Float64


#### tyc_b

- Column Name: tyc_b
- Description: Tycho B Magnitude
- Unit: mag
- Data Type: Float32


#### tyc_b_e

- Column Name: tyc_b_e
- Description: Error in Tycho B Magnitude
- Unit: mag
- Data Type: Float32


#### tyc_v

- Column Name: tyc_v
- Description: Tycho V Magnitude
- Unit: mag
- Data Type: Float32


#### tyc_v_e

- Column Name: tyc_v_e
- Description: Error in Tycho V Magnitude
- Unit: mag
- Data Type: Float32


#### hip_plx

- Column Name: hip_plx
- Description: Hipparcos Parallax
- Unit: mas
- Data Type: Float32


#### hip_plx_e

- Column Name: hip_plx_e
- Description: Error in Hipparcos Parallax
- Unit: mas
- Data Type: Float32


#### hip_sptype

- Column Name: hip_sptype
- Description: Hipparcos Spectral Type
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: String


#### twomass_designation

- Column Name: twomass_designation
- Description: 2MASS Designation ID in dr20_twomass_psc
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: String


#### tycho2_designation

- Column Name: tycho2_designation
- Description: Tycho2 Designation ID in dr20_tycho2
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: String
